NKJV.1: A Psalm of Thanksgiving. Make a joyful shout to the LORD, all you lands!
NKJV.2: Serve the LORD with gladness; Come before His presence with singing.
NKJV.3: Know that the LORD, He is God; It is He who has made us, and not we ourselves; We are His people and the sheep of His pasture.
NKJV.4: Enter into His gates with thanksgiving, And into His courts with praise. Be thankful to Him, and bless His name.
NKJV.5: For the LORD is good; His mercy is everlasting, And His truth endures to all generations.

KJV.1: A Psalm<S>4210</S> of praise<S>8426</S>. Make a joyful noise<S>7321</S> unto the LORD<S>3068</S>, all ye lands<S>776</S>. <sup>praise: or, thanksgiving</sup> <sup>all: Heb. all the earth</sup>
KJV.2: Serve<S>5647</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> with gladness<S>8057</S>: come<S>935</S> before his presence<S>6440</S> with singing<S>7445</S>.
KJV.3: Know<S>3045</S> ye that the LORD<S>3068</S> he is God<S>430</S>: it is he that hath made<S>6213</S> us, and not we ourselves; we are his people<S>5971</S>, and the sheep<S>6629</S> of his pasture<S>4830</S>. <sup>and not: or, and his we are</sup>
KJV.4: Enter<S>935</S> into his gates<S>8179</S> with thanksgiving<S>8426</S>, and into his courts<S>2691</S> with praise<S>8416</S>: be thankful<S>3034</S> unto him, and bless<S>1288</S> his name<S>8034</S>.
KJV.5: For the LORD<S>3068</S> is good<S>2896</S>; his mercy<S>2617</S> is everlasting<S>5769</S>; and his truth<S>530</S> endureth to all<S>1755</S> generations<S>1755</S>. <sup>to all: Heb. to generation and generation</sup>

ESV.1: Make a joyful noise to the LORD, all the earth!
ESV.2: Serve the LORD with gladness! Come into his presence with singing!
ESV.3: Know that the LORD, he is God! It is he who made us, and we are his;  we are his people, and the sheep of his pasture.
ESV.4: Enter his gates with thanksgiving, and his courts with praise! Give thanks to him; bless his name!
ESV.5: For the LORD is good; his steadfast love endures forever, and his faithfulness to all generations.

NASB.1: A Psalm for Thanksgiving. Shout joyfully to the LORD, all the earth.
NASB.2: Serve the LORD with gladness; Come before Him with joyful singing.
NASB.3: Know that the LORD Himself is God; It is He who has made us, and not we ourselves; [We are] His people and the sheep of His pasture.
NASB.4: Enter His gates with thanksgiving [And] His courts with praise. Give thanks to Him, bless His name.
NASB.5: For the LORD is good; His lovingkindness is everlasting And His faithfulness to all generations.

NLT.1: Shout with joy to the LORD, all the earth!
NLT.2:
Worship the LORD with gladness.
Come before him, singing with joy.
NLT.3:
Acknowledge that the LORD is God!
He made us, and we are his.
We are his people, the sheep of his pasture.
NLT.4:
Enter his gates with thanksgiving;
go into his courts with praise.
Give thanks to him and praise his name.
NLT.5:
For the LORD is good.
His unfailing love continues forever,
and his faithfulness continues to each generation.

WEB.1: A Psalm of thanksgiving. Shout for joy to Yahweh, all you lands!
WEB.2: Serve Yahweh with gladness. Come before his presence with singing.
WEB.3: Know that Yahweh, he is God. It is he who has made us, and we are his. We are his people, and the sheep of his pasture.
WEB.4: Enter into his gates with thanksgiving, into his courts with praise. Give thanks to him, and bless his name.
WEB.5: For Yahweh is good. His loving kindness endures forever, his faithfulness to all generations.

CSB17.1: A psalm of thanksgiving. [1] Let the whole earth shout triumphantly to God! ⓔ
CSB17.2:
Serve the LORD with gladness;
come before him with joyful songs. ⓕ
CSB17.3:
Acknowledge that the LORD is God.
He made us, and we are his [1] ⓖ—
his people, the sheep of his pasture. ⓗ
CSB17.4:
Enter his gates with thanksgiving ⓘ
and his courts with praise.
Give thanks to him and bless his name. ⓙ
CSB17.5:
For the LORD is good, and his faithful love endures forever;
his faithfulness, through all generations.

AMP.1: A Psalm of Thanksgiving. Shout joyfully to the LORD, all the earth.
AMP.2:
Serve the LORD with gladness and delight;
Come before His presence with joyful singing.
AMP.3:
Know and fully recognize with gratitude that the LORD Himself is God;
It is He who has made us, not we ourselves [and we are His].
We are His people and the sheep of His pasture.
AMP.4:
Enter His gates with a song of thanksgiving
And His courts with praise.
Be thankful to Him, bless and praise His name.
AMP.5:
For the LORD is good;
His mercy and lovingkindness are everlasting,
His faithfulness [endures] to all generations.

MSG.1:
A thanksgiving psalm
On your feet now—applaud God!
MSG.2:
Bring a gift of laughter,
sing yourselves into his presence.
MSG.3:
Know this: God is God, and God, God.
He made us; we didn't make him.
We're his people, his well-tended sheep.
MSG.4:
Enter with the password: "Thank you!"
Make yourselves at home, talking praise.
Thank him. Worship him.
MSG.5:
For God is sheer beauty,
all-generous in love,
loyal always and ever.

NIV.1:
Psalm 100
A psalm. For giving thanks.
Shout for joy to the Lord, all the earth.
NIV.2:
Worship the Lord with gladness;
come before him with joyful songs.
NIV.3:
Know that the Lord is God.
It is he who made us, and we are his;
we are his people, the sheep of his pasture.
NIV.4:
Enter his gates with thanksgiving
and his courts with praise;
give thanks to him and praise his name.
NIV.5:
For the Lord is good and his love endures forever;
his faithfulness continues through all generations.

NRSVCE.1: Make a joyful noise to the LORD, all the earth.
NRSVCE.2:
Worship the LORD with gladness;
come into his presence with singing.
NRSVCE.3:
Know that the LORD is God.
It is he that made us, and we are his;
we are his people, and the sheep of his pasture.
NRSVCE.4:
Enter his gates with thanksgiving,
and his courts with praise.
Give thanks to him, bless his name.
NRSVCE.5:

NET.1: Shout out praises to the LORD, all the earth!
NET.2: Worship the LORD with joy! Enter his presence with joyful singing!
NET.3: Acknowledge that the LORD is God! He made us and we belong to him; we are his people, the sheep of his pasture.
NET.4: Enter his gates with thanksgiving, and his courts with praise! Give him thanks! Praise his name!
NET.5: For the LORD is good. His loyal love endures, and he is faithful through all generations.
